rows.need: preserve modal strength so permission, obligation, and possibility do not collapse
rows.title: Modal Obligation / Permission Lens

rows.need: preserve alternative branches and avoid committing mutually exclusive choices together
rows.title: Alternative Choice Lens

rows.need: preserve RFC-style requirement keywords and their normative strength
rows.title: Spec Requirement Keyword Lens

rows.need: ground natural-language math operator words before calculation or defer
rows.title: Math Word Operator Lens

rows.need: ground qualitative confidence without inventing numeric probability
rows.title: Confidence Phrase Without Number Lens

rows.need: ground git branch/tag references without confusing them with file paths
rows.title: Git Branch / Tag Lens

rows.need: avoid committing pronoun references when the antecedent is unstable
rows.title: Cross-Reference Pronoun Guard

rows.need: merge or separate claims by source without losing provenance
rows.title: Multi-Source Claim Merge Lens

rows.need: bind tradeoff language to its option instead of flattening all claims as equal
rows.title: Pros / Cons Tradeoff Lens

rows.need: ground recurrence expressions separately from one-time dates
rows.title: Schedule Recurrence Lens

rows.need: ground corrections and retractions so stale statements are not reused
rows.title: Correction / Retraction Lens

rows.need: bind expected and actual outcomes without swapping them
rows.title: Test Assertion Lens

rows.need: bind legal-like rights and obligations to the correct party and scope
rows.title: Legal Rights / Obligation Lens

rows.need: separate training labels from observed facts and model outputs
rows.title: Training Signal / Label Lens

rows.need: bind API response fields to their values or schema role
rows.title: API Response Field Lens

rows.need: bind tasks to owners without leaking ownership across nearby tasks
rows.title: Task Owner Assignment Lens

rows.need: detect unit conversion/equivalence phrases without committing unsupported conversions
rows.title: Unit Conversion Phrase Lens

rows.need: ground survey response scales and avoid treating ordinal labels as numeric facts
rows.title: Survey Response Scale Lens

rows.need: flag benchmark leakage caveats before treating metrics as valid evidence
rows.title: Benchmark Leakage Guard

rows.need: detect personal-data/privacy spans and keep them from unsafe broad reuse
rows.title: Privacy / Personal Data Lens

rows.need: bind dataset provenance and source information to the dataset claim
rows.title: Dataset Provenance Lens

rows.need: bind permission modes and access verbs to the right file or role
rows.title: File Permission Mode Lens

rows.need: detect model checkpoint references as artifacts rather than content claims
rows.title: Model Checkpoint Lens

rows.need: bind mitigation actions to the failure or risk they address
rows.title: Mitigation Action Lens

rows.need: bind chart labels and legends to represented variables
rows.title: Chart Axis / Legend Lens

rows.need: ground failure-mode descriptions for later negative-card reuse
rows.title: Failure Mode Phrase Lens

rows.need: bind reproducibility seed and replay evidence to the correct run
rows.title: Reproducibility Seed Lens

rows.need: bind table row/column references to the correct value span
rows.title: Table Row / Value Lens

rows.need: ground completion criteria before marking a task complete
rows.title: Acceptance Criteria Lens

rows.need: treat inline code spans as identifiers or literals rather than normal prose
rows.title: Inline Code Identifier Lens

rows.need: ground technical standard references as opaque spec identifiers
rows.title: Standard / Spec Reference Lens

rows.need: detect redaction placeholders and avoid hallucinating hidden content
rows.title: Redaction Placeholder Lens

rows.need: bind dosage, unit, and frequency without over-broad medical claims
rows.title: Medical Dosage Span Lens

rows.need: detect figure/table captions and preserve caption scope
rows.title: Figure Caption Lens

rows.need: bind quality caveats to the affected evidence or metric
rows.title: Data Quality Caveat Lens

rows.need: detect scientific notation spans and preserve exponent/value meaning
rows.title: Scientific Notation Lens

rows.need: detect algorithmic complexity notation and preserve its symbolic meaning
rows.title: Complexity Notation Lens

rows.need: bind hyperparameter names to values and keep them out of ordinary numeric claims
rows.title: Hyperparameter Assignment Lens

rows.need: ground confidence intervals as interval evidence, not exact values
rows.title: Confidence Interval Lens

rows.need: preserve the base of percentage claims
rows.title: Percentage Base Guard

rows.need: connect footnote markers to support text without treating markers as content
rows.title: Footnote Marker Lens

rows.need: ground HTTP method, endpoint, and status response as protocol structure
rows.title: HTTP Status / Endpoint Lens

rows.need: ground stacktrace frames as diagnostic structure
rows.title: Stacktrace Frame Lens
